# Transcrição: 30-Coaching Funnel Ad Formats 

- **Fonte:** 30-Coaching Funnel Ad Formats 
- **Duração:** 03:15
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 03:01]

Hey guys, so let's have a look at some of the most popular ad formats for this kind of industry. Now generally speaking, what you're going to see these kinds of clients using is three main types of formats. The first one being the typical single image link click ad format. So this is the one that is the most common on the newsfeed. You see it's got a headline and then it's got a single image. Obviously go through the creative training that's available to you for ideas on the type of image to use here and what to test out. Another very popular ad format is the one where it's actually just a post so it doesn't have a headline. That's the difference. You see the one before and this one doesn't have a headline. It doesn't have a call to action button. It's simply usually a portrait style or square image or a video with a sort of frame added to it like in this example. That works really well by the way guys and FYI we use a tool called screen flow to create this kind of frame on our videos. But this is basically just a post and they have to click more to see the link to click through to whatever the offer or whatever it's sending people. Now this is using a post engagement objective campaign. If you are using this inside of your retargeting then you're likely using that objective anyway. So that's fine. If you're trying to use this ad format at the top of your funnel but you want to run that as a conversion objective. What you do is you simply create a dummy post engagement objective campaign and then at the ad level once you create your ad you preview it in the news feed. You take the ad ID and then you use that ad ID inside of your conversion objective campaign. If you're not sure how to set that up watch the B of retargeting training inside of this membership portal. And then lastly another really common ad format is the video ad format. If you're doing rapid fire testing you probably won't have access to this nor would I recommend you get your client to do anything until you have tested out and validated the lead magnets etc etc. But obviously videos are very very good because they allow you to create custom audiences and retarget anyone that you know showed some kind of interest or engagement with the offer or the funnel. And those are the typical three ad formats that you're going to be working with inside of this industry. It's not to say that we haven't seen some cool stuff being done with carousel ads. In fact inside of the retargeting one of the things you can do with carousel is annihilate all of the objections people have one carousel at a time.

## [03:01 - 03:15]

But these are the three typical ad formats that you guys should really be focused on. Obviously you're going to be using lead ads during your rapid fire test so there's training below here on how to set up lead ads and how to set up all of these ad formats as well.
